summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. Verified: Midnight Blue #0F056B color change, JAPAP SVG logo integration, and full database migration from WoWonder MySQL dump. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly with new design tokens.
critical_code_review_comments: Midnight Blue #0F056B correctly applied to all primary buttons and balance card
Terracotta #E07A5F correctly applied to Retirer button and MESSENGER subtitle
JAPAP SVG logo (logo-icon.svg, logo-full.svg) properly integrated in sidebar
Profile page gradient transitions from Midnight Blue to Terracotta
Migration data verified: 6221 users, 608 transactions, 2005 messages
Legacy users have 'legacy_' prefix in user_id (e.g., legacy_6308)
Wallet balances from WoWonder database preserved (total: 2,316,553,382,023 XAF)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI flows working, design system applied correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test users and migrated legacy data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified color change from Forest Green to Midnight Blue #0F056B, JAPAP logo integration, and full ETL migration. Key changes: --jp-primary now #0F056B, logo-icon.svg and logo-full.svg created, 6219 legacy users migrated with 'legacy_' prefix. All wallet flows (deposit, withdraw, send) working. Admin dashboard shows migration stats: 6221 users, 608 transactions, 2005 messages, 2.3 trillion XAF total balance.

chat_page.sidebar_logo: ✓ JAPAP logo with MESSENGER in Terracotta
chat_page.active_nav: ✓ Midnight Blue background for active nav

tests_executed.backend_api_tests: 24/24 passed - All auth, wallet, messaging, admin, user endpoints working
frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads with Midnight Blue #0F056B CTA button
JAPAP logo SVG visible in sidebar and login page
Admin login with admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! works
Chat page sidebar uses Midnight Blue for active nav
Wallet page balance card is Midnight Blue #0F056B
Admin dashboard shows 6221 total users (migration data)
Admin users list shows migrated users with legacy_ prefix
Profile page gradient uses Midnight Blue to Terracotta
